summary: Added an Intake Edge audit for current incoming message and observation channels. The audit classifies mailbox, file-drop/leave-message, CLI inbox, MCP inbox, hosted registry messages, webhook, pub/sub, agent report, system observation, daemon source, and external hosted communication paths with source owner, target authority, artifact, admission boundary, lifecycle status, capability/trust posture, implementation posture, and known gaps. It records current inbox doctor posture as operational visibility state rather than semantic authority failure.

verification.result: passed: local inbox DB accessible, CLI build present, message_routing_authority unconfigured with legacy local allow posture, publication_pending with 200 uncommitted inbox artifacts
passed: located current implementation and doctrine evidence for audited surfaces

verification.command: rg -n "Exchange mailbox|Human file drop|CLI inbox submit|MCP inbox submit|Hosted registry message candidate|Webhook source|Site pub/sub signal|Agent report|System observation|Site-local daemon source|message_routing_authority|publication_pending|Doctrine-only|Implemented|Residuals" docs\product\incoming-message-intake-edge-audit-20260518.md
verification.result: passed: required channel coverage, implementation classification, operational posture, and residuals present

residuals: No first-class edge registry/read model exists yet.
Cross-Site MCP inbox submission still requires admitted canonical_inbox_cross_site_submission capability.
Ledger integration for rejected/deferred candidates is partial and should be added incrementally.
